untranslatable_reason: OBV (On-Balance Volume) is not in the allowed indicators list. The signal specifically requires OBV and its moving average trend, which cannot be accurately replicated using only volume and price-based indicators. Substituted with volume crossing sma_20 as a proxy, but this does not capture the true OBV logic described in the source text.
translation_notes: Signal references OBV (On-Balance Volume) which accumulates volume based on price direction changes. This indicator is not available in the allowed list. Approximated using raw volume crossing its 20-period simple moving average as a volume direction proxy. For proper implementation, OBV indicator must be added to the allowed indicators. Moving average period set to sma_20 (closest to the 'up to 100 weeks' parameter, converted to daily bars).
